artPrompt: A vast still reservoir under a moonless sky, its black water glassy and unbroken, a lone amber dock lamp reflected as a single trembling smear; dark hills and a silent spillway dissolve into smoky brown haze along the far shore, no figures, only deep secretive water holding its silence, rendered with quiet melancholy, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: The Reservoir at Night
text:
{T}: Add {B}.
{3}{B}, {T}: Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand. The reservoir gives back exactly what the Don decides it gives back, and not one boot more.
flavorText: Still water. Deep water. A water that has signed a non-disclosure agreement.
